title: Ambient fall-risk sensing in elder home care pilots
summary: Small pilots use privacy-preserving, on-device mmWave/vision sensors to detect gait changes and near-falls in home care apartments; results used to trigger proactive visits.
notes: Weak signal due to small scale + uncertain scaling economics.

title: AI-supported triage & documentation in primary care
summary: Speech-to-text + clinical summarization reduce admin burden and speed triage; vendor rollouts expanding across outpatient clinics; early studies show time savings and improved note quality.
notes: Adoption gated by privacy & workflow fit; measurable ROI emerging.

title: Severe solar storm causes regional EHR cloud outage
summary: A geomagnetic superstorm disrupts data centers and telecoms leading to multi-day loss of access to regional EHRs and ePrescription services; emergency paper fallbacks and manual reconciliation required.
notes: Low probability, very high impact; resilience & offline workflows relevant.
